# SFT environment: LLaMA-Factory + DeepSpeed + flash-attn
# Uses torch 2.6.0 (not 2.10) for pre-built flash-attn wheel compatibility.
# Install: conda create -n sft python=3.11 -y && conda activate sft && pip install -r requirements/sft.txt

--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu126

torch==2.6.0
torchvision==0.21.0
llamafactory[deepspeed,metrics]==0.9.4
flash-attn @ https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention/releases/download/v2.8.3/flash_attn-2.8.3+cu12torch2.6cxx11abiTRUE-cp311-cp311-linux_x86_64.whl
liger-kernel==0.7.0
wandb
anthropic
